title: Linear Regression Model
explanation: It shows how adjustable weights map inputs to outputs, enabling prediction of future events.

title: Linear weighted sum for binary decisions
explanation: The teacher demonstrates that multiplying an input vector of yes/no decisions by a weight vector produces the raw prediction, which is then compared to a threshold.

title: Weighted sum with threshold in linear model
explanation: Adjusting input values and weights lets students see how the linear combination produces the predicted output.
